title: Varis Gilaj / ASU Frat Leader
about:
Varis Gilaj, also known as the ASU Frat Leader, is a fitness influencer and looksmaxxer who went viral in 2026 after appearing in a video where viewers joked that his wider physical build and posture visually dominated streamer Clavicular in the same camera frame, a dynamic referred to as "frame mogging."

Varis began posting content on TikTok in January 2024 and gained over 150,000 followers over the next two years. In mid-2025, fitness influencer Joey Swoll posted a video calling out Gilaj and his friends for filming themselves flexing in a gym locker room and capturing footage of an elderly man in the background.

In February 2026, after the frame mogging video went viral, online interest in Varis increased, resulting in posts and memes about Varis. That month, fitness influencer Androgenic allegedly travelled to America to find Varis and frame mog him to claims his status as the "number one Chad."

Gliaj posts as @v.varis on TikTok and varisgilaj on Instagram.
